collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (4 total Queries, 4 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `p`.*, `c`.`nama_kategori`, `pi`.`file_path` as `foto_utama`, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) as avg_rating, COUNT(r.id) as review_count FROM `products` `p` LEFT JOIN `categories` `c` ON `c`.`id` = `p`.`category_id` LEFT JOIN `product_images` `pi` ON `pi`.`product_id` = `p`.`id` AND `pi`.`urutan` = 0 LEFT JOIN `reviews` `r` ON `r`.`product_id` = `p`.`id` WHERE `p`.`deleted_at` IS NULL GROUP BY `p`.`id` ORDER BY `p`.`created_at` DESC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `p`.*, `c`.`nama_kategori`, `pi`.`file_path` as `foto_utama`, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) as avg_rating, COUNT(r.id) as review_count FROM `products` `p` LEFT JOIN `categories` `c` ON `c`.`id` = `p`.`category_id` LEFT JOIN `product_images` `pi` ON `pi`.`product_id` = `p`.`id` AND `pi`.`urutan` = 0 LEFT JOIN `reviews` `r` ON `r`.`product_id` = `p`.`id` WHERE `p`.`deleted_at` IS NULL GROUP BY `p`.`id` ORDER BY `p`.`created_at` DESC
